Headline: Closure - Horris Hill School, Berkshire
Info: Horris Hill School, an independent prep school in Newbury, has announced it will permanently close at the end of the current academic year, with pupils recommended to transfer to nearby Cheam School.

Headline: Closure - Ysgol Mynyddygarreg (State), Carmarthenshire
Info: Kidwelly Town Council has voted unanimously to oppose the proposed closure of Ysgol Mynyddygarreg, a local state primary school facing potential shutdown by the county council.

Headline: Closure - Moyles Court School, Hampshire
Info: Moyles Court School has announced it will permanently close at the end of the current academic year, citing declining pupil numbers and the financial strain caused by the introduction of VAT on independent school fees.

Headline: Financial - Fairview International School, Stirling
Info: Fairview International School has entered into a consultation process regarding its long-term viability, warning of potential closure due to significant financial challenges and declining enrolment numbers.

Headline: Closure - Trinity Christian School, Reading
Info: Trinity Christian School has announced its permanent closure after 13 years of operation, citing severe financial pressures exacerbated by the introduction of VAT on private school fees and the removal of business rates relief.

Headline: Closure - Fountainhall Primary (State), Scottish Borders
Info: The local council has agreed to proceed with a statutory consultation to permanently close Fountainhall Primary School, which was mothballed last year after its pupil roll fell to just one student.
